_comment: Batch-ingest template. Run: npm run enter -- --json data/samples/assessment_form.example.json  (or copy this file per athlete). For an EXISTING athlete, set athleteId and drop displayName. For a NEW athlete, dob + sex (M/F) enable the maturity-offset estimate. Scores are 0-3 in fixed order. Set broadLandingFailed true if the broad-jump landing was uncontrolled (caps Test 5 at 1). sittingHeightCm is optional and feeds the maturity estimate (required for the male equation). paper.* is optional cross-check of what was hand-written. coachGutCall is the coach's independent tier for validation.
